label: CRM, Sales & Marketing Operations Pak
blurb: CRM, Sales & Marketing Operations. Direct revenue generation and data hygiene.

skills.label: Crm Duplicate Merger
skills.method: Fuzzy matches Salesforce/HubSpot records, flags conflicts, merges data safely.
trigger_examples: cures poisoned crm data that ruins campaigns

skills.label: Social Media Repurposer
skills.method: Takes a 2000-word blog, chops into a 5-tweet thread, a LinkedIn post, and an Instagram caption.

skills.label: Lead Enrichment Scraper
skills.method: Takes an email, scrapes LinkedIn/Clearbit, updates CRM with title and company size.
trigger_examples: empowers sales reps with instant context

skills.label: Seo Meta Tag Generator
skills.method: Reads blog content, generates optimal length meta titles/descriptions based on keyword density.

skills.label: Cold Outreach Personalizer
skills.method: Reads prospect's recent company news, drafts 3 unique, non-spammy opening lines.

skills.label: Sales Objection Handler
skills.method: Listens to Gong/Zoom transcripts, identifies prospect hesitation, feeds rep battle-cards.

skills.label: Churn Risk Flag
skills.method: Analyzes support ticket sentiment \+ login frequency, alerts Account Manager.
trigger_examples: saves recurring revenue before the cancellation hits

skills.label: Rfp Questionnaire Filler
skills.method: Parses 100-page Request For Proposal PDFs, matches questions to past winning answers.
trigger_examples: turns a 2-week sales task into 2 hours

skills.label: Competitor Price Monitor
skills.method: Scrapes competitor pricing pages daily, alerts Slack if they drop prices.
